author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause: line 291 says 'loop over heads since we lack batched matmul' — but bmm exists (and now has f16 Tensor Core support from CL-268). Fix: replace the per-head serial loop with bmm calls. Q_heads/K_heads/V_heads are already [num_heads, seq, head_dim] — perfect for bmm.
